The boundaries are clear based on content changes and formatting.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for November Guide Lessons, covering Theology, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has clear boundaries and distinct subject matter. The lessons are sequential and comprehensive, forming a complete monthly curriculum.
